src: A fluffy Persian kitten with a brown and cream coat and black stripes. It has blue eyes, a bushy tail, and whiskers around its round face. Standing confidently on delicate paws.
edit: A fantastical alien creature with vibrant rainbow scales, luminous eyes, tendril-like whiskers, elongated wing-like ears, and colorful feathery neck frills. Its tail is elongated with sparkling gemstones.

per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object stands sideways, head on the left, on a grey tiled staircase with a fluffy, upturned tail. There's a parallel metal railing and soft light from the top right, with a blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object is in a close-up view on the grey staircase, facing forward, bushy tail slightly lowered, daylight from the right side.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: The object sits on the stair with paws close together, body slightly tilted, next to a vertical metal railing on its right, under soft, even light.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object is on a grey step, front legs apart, head turned to face the camera, with shiny metal railing in the background under bright diffused lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object sits at the edge of a stair, looking slightly to the side, with a fluffy tail and metal railing. Ambient light creates soft shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object is sideways, head left, on a grey tiled staircase with a fluffy, upturned tail. A metal railing runs parallel. Warm amber light illuminates from the top right. The unfocused background hints at fallen leaves, creating an autumn atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object stands on a leaf-covered staircase, facing forward in autumn light. Its bushy tail lowered, catches leaves, with golden afternoon light illuminating the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: An object rests on the staircase, paws together, casting a shadow. Its body leans slightly, framed by a railing on the right with crimson and gold leaves. The lighting is warm and golden, typical of autumn.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object is seated on an amber-hued step, front legs apart, head slightly turned towards the camera, surrounded by fallen autumn leaves. The background has shiny metal railing like tree branches with warm, diffused golden lighting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object rests at the edge of a stair with its tail amidst fallen leaves. A metal railing, highlighted by autumn light, adds depth, surrounded by shadows and ambient light through the crisp autumn air.
